text.message: Blue, how do you average almost 11 points per game? That makes no sense
I'll go for 11 this game though
can't trade ya wood if you're blocking it :[
can’t trade you ore after u block it
i know u wanted to rob me but logic tells u to rob red
I play to win, not for revenge, you played well
i strive to be like u bro
as crazy as it seems red is still in the lead
doesn't look like there's a way for me to take road
3 straight 3s to win the game like Steph curry
